retry_reason: This is a release callback triggered when refcount reaches zero; it is called exactly once, retrying would cause double-free.
contract_summary: Release callback for kref-based reference counting on struct j1939_ecu. Called automatically by kref_put when the refcount drops to zero. Removes the ecu from its list, frees the memory, and releases the parent j1939_priv reference. The caller must never use the ecu pointer after this function returns, as the object is freed.
